chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-216 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 10.08.2022 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh. ----- None present for the petitioner. Last time the case was fixed on 10.01.2019 when also no one for the petitioner was present. Even otherwise, case history shows that the petitioner and his counsel have never taken any interest to pursue this petition. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
